title: Enaintha Kaikal
subTitle: David, an army veteran, and Pratap, a criminal, set out for conflicting reasons to rescue Gunasekaran, who is being held in an enemy military prison.

title: Aaha Ethanai Azhagu
subTitle: A boy and a girl gradually fall in love, after several encounters. They decide to elope when their parents oppose the alliance, but they meet with an accident.

title: Muthu
subTitle: Muthu serves as a loyal servant to Raja Malayasimman, a rich landlord. However, things between them turn sour when they both fall in love with the same woman.

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Enga Ooru Kavalkaran
subTitle: A young and beautiful woman falls in love with her bodyguard. However, they must overcome many challenges in order to be together.

title: Mounaragam
subTitle: Divya is a lively young girl, who secretly mourns the death of her lover. She reluctantly agrees to an arranged marriage with Chandrakumar and faces difficulties.

title: Kanni Rasi
subTitle: Lakshmipathy falls for his niece, Dhanalakshmi, and decides to marry her. However, their wedding gets cancelled when an astrologer predicts his death if they both marry.

title: My Dear Marthandan
subTitle: Wealthy village heir Marthandan grows weary of opulence and yearns for change. Soon, he embarks on a journey to embrace simplicity amidst urban poverty.

title: Thanthu Vitten Ennai
subTitle: Raju, an unemployed young man, falls in love with Surya, a girl from an affluent family. However, when her father asks him to get a job before their marriage, his life becomes challenging.

title: Alaigal Oivathillai
subTitle: Love blossoms between two individuals, but their differing religious beliefs create various obstacles in their relationship.

title: Vaazhkai Chakkaram
subTitle: In hopes of marrying Kalyani, Inspector Thangavelu convinces his father to abandon the dowry system. However, a misunderstanding takes things in an unexpected direction.

title: Vaazhkai Chakkaram
subTitle: In hopes of marrying Kalyani, Inspector Thangavelu convinces his father to abandon the dowry system. However, a misunderstanding takes things in an unexpected direction.

title: Viyabari
subTitle: A zealous entrepreneur clones himself to balance his work and family life. However, after a tragic mishap, he realizes the unforeseen consequences of his actions.

title: Yai Nee Romba Azhaga Irukey
subTitle: Four youngsters go through various ups and downs in their lives when they experience unrequited love and encounter rejection.

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Periyanna
subTitle: While teaching music to a district collector's daughter, a prisoner falls in love with her. Afraid of getting caught, the lovers elope to a village and befriend the village chief, who helps them out.

title: Vasanthakala Paravai
subTitle: Ravi, a shopkeeper, falls in love with Uma, a student, who belongs to a rich family. But their relationship is tested when Uma's brother decides to intervene and break their bond.

title: Enaintha Kaikal
subTitle: David, an army veteran, and Pratap, a criminal, set out for conflicting reasons to rescue Gunasekaran, who is being held in an enemy military prison.

title: Rajavin Parvaiyile
subTitle: A wealthy man's daughter, Gowri, falls in love with Raja, a man from a shaky background. However, he rejects her due to his fears stemming from his friend Chandru's tragic love story.

title: Sangamam
subTitle: Selvam, a rural folk artist, falls in love with Abhirami, a classical dancer. However, things become complicated when her father disapproves of their relationship.

title: Rajadhi Raja
subTitle: Raja, a rich estate owner's son, comes back from abroad in order to avenge his dead father. However, things get complicated when he is framed, and he finds his doppelganger in his village.

title: Arasu
subTitle: Thirunavukkarasu, a soft-spoken man, has two good-natured parents who are involved in the upliftment of society. However, when his parents are brutally assassinated, he seeks revenge for their deaths.

subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Mundhanai Mudichu
subTitle: Mischievous Parimalam, known for pranking her villagers, falls for a widowed teacher. When he proves unyielding about not marrying her, she pulls a trick and does everything to win him over.
